displayTitle: Star Wars (1977) #44: The Empire Strikes Back: Duel a Dark Lord
synopsis:
Adapting the climax of *The Empire Strikes Back*, Luke Skywalker and R2-D2 arrive in Cloud City and search for their friends. Darth Vader hands the carbon-frozen Han Solo over to Boba Fett and alters his bargain with Lando Calrissian, ordering Leia and Chewbacca taken aboard his ship. Guilt-ridden, Lando turns his own men against the stormtroopers, freeing Leia, Chewbacca, and the partially rebuilt C-3PO, but they reach the landing pad too late to stop Fett from leaving with Han. They flee Cloud City aboard the *Millennium Falcon*.

Luke confronts Vader in the carbon-freezing facility, and their duel carries them onto a gantry above an exhaust shaft, where Vader severs Luke's right hand and reveals that he is his father. Refusing to accept it, Luke throws himself into the shaft and is left hanging from a sensor vane beneath the city. He reaches out through the Force to Leia, who orders Lando to turn the *Falcon* around. They recover him and rejoin the Rebel fleet, where Luke receives a cybernetic hand and must reckon with his failure to save Han and the truth of his parentage.
title: Star Wars (1977) #44: The Empire Strikes Back: Duel a Dark Lord
